title: Arrange marketing of livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Arrange marketing of livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine sales characteristics and demand

pcs.text: Research market information to identify potential purchasers and their purchasing requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research market information to identify potential purchasers and their purchasing requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research market information to identify potential purchasers and their purchasing requirements.

pcs.text: Observe current and recent sales to monitor market trends and patterns

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe current and recent sales to monitor market trends and patterns.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and review market entry regulatory requirements to ensure quality assurance and fitness for sale.

pcs.text: Determine ability to deliver product to meet market demand and requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine ability to deliver product to meet market demand and requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document livestock marketing plan.
